capabilities.value: Public CEX instrument, ticker, Kline and WebSocket access plus provider failure fixtures.
capabilities.defect: Provider access is not yet confined behind one point-in-time Fact authority; capability and identity semantics differ by caller.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 adapters pass pagination, gap, duplicate, reconnect, 429 and schema-drift tests and all Legacy consumers are zero.

capabilities.value: Rotation, quota and priority scheduling ideas can inform resource policy.
capabilities.defect: Identity collapses venues into baseAsset+USDT and mixes eligibility, liquidity tier and scan priority.
capabilities.deleteGate: 100% observed accounting, canonical identity reconciliation and replacement scan scheduling pass Shadow.

capabilities.value: Existing scheduling, freshness and candidate-pressure behavior is useful as a comparison baseline.
capabilities.defect: Discovery, ranking, state presentation and signal-shaped outputs are not fully separated.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 Detector replay and real-time no-write Shadow meet approved recall, precision, lead-time and queue criteria.

capabilities.value: Explicit auth/rate-limit/plan failure classifications and truthful unavailable states.
capabilities.defect: Provider set is incomplete, CoinGlass plan and 30/min are hard-coded, and endpoint rights/lineage are not authoritative.
capabilities.deleteGate: All enabled V2 endpoints have fresh docs review, live probe, schema fingerprint, license and fallback contract.

capabilities.value: Market breadth/regime concepts and deterministic tests.
capabilities.defect: No single feature/fact cutoff authority shared by every Detector and Analyzer.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 MarketContext is point-in-time replayable and all detector-specific regime copies are gone.

capabilities.value: Indicators, key-level, structure, risk and counter-evidence functions can be evaluated for extraction.
capabilities.defect: Multiple generations coexist and several paths mix analysis, score, strategy, entry, stop and target.
capabilities.deleteGate: Per-function extraction registry complete and the single family pipeline passes holdout/Shadow.

capabilities.value: WAIT/BLOCKED/READY separation, complete-plan checks, structural RR floor and anti-false-READY tests.
capabilities.defect: It sits alongside older decision paths and is called from an over-broad frontend contract.
capabilities.deleteGate: Only one V2 writer can produce ActionState and legacy decision consumers are zero.

capabilities.value: Serializable transactions, instrument lock, UUIDv7, idempotency, append-only events, outbox and migration safety.
capabilities.defect: Legacy maturity combines candidate, evidence, WAIT, BLOCKED and READY semantics and lacks OpportunityThesis family identity.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 Episode schema and migration pass rehearsal, lineage, reconciliation, Shadow and authority cutover.

capabilities.value: Existing transition semantics are useful as test cases.
capabilities.defect: Parallel lifecycle authority overlaps Candidate Episode and signal maturity.
capabilities.deleteGate: Consumer scan proves no route, worker or review path reads this lifecycle.

capabilities.value: Postgres client, record mapping and repository tests contain reusable patterns.
capabilities.defect: DATABASE_URL absence selects memory mode for objects that V2 requires to fail closed; authority scope is broad.
capabilities.deleteGate: Per-schema roles, outbox, unavailable behavior, backup and restore tests pass and no V2 authority can fall back to memory.

capabilities.value: Existing API fields and client compatibility cases inform the read migration.
capabilities.defect: A roughly 5,683-line frontend contract mixes aggregation, formatting and decision calls; HTTP success can overstate business truth.
capabilities.deleteGate: All pages consume one DecisionSnapshot and contract/dual-read diff is approved.

capabilities.value: User workflow observations and component behavior are references for the future workbench.
capabilities.defect: Page/SSR paths can trigger data work, and display structures reflect multiple backend truths; mock display data exists in a dedicated data area.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 E2E, accessibility, visual and performance gates pass after read-authority cutover.

capabilities.value: Cooldown, dedupe and semantic alert-policy tests.
capabilities.defect: Alerts are not yet driven exclusively by immutable DecisionSnapshot state events and attention budgets.
capabilities.deleteGate: Duplicate/stale READY alert count is zero and delivery receipts are authoritative.

capabilities.value: Outcome checkpoints, missed-opportunity concepts, user journal separation and Shadow evidence patterns.
capabilities.defect: Evaluation, calibration, weight proposals, user review and production-adjacent state are not fully separated by authority.
capabilities.deleteGate: Frozen Outcome datasets, research registry, no-future-leak tests and promotion separation pass.

capabilities.value: Golden cases, professional audit, missed denominator and future-leak defenses.
capabilities.defect: Legacy metrics and labels are not automatically comparable with the frozen V2 event-label contract.
capabilities.deleteGate: Not planned; retain as evidence until V2 replacements exceed retention requirements.

capabilities.value: Private-session baseline and request-security tests.
capabilities.defect: API default-deny and per-role runtime authority are not complete.
capabilities.deleteGate: ASVS matrix, default-deny API and session rotation/logout tests pass.

capabilities.value: Worker heartbeat, scan health and production evidence lessons.
capabilities.defect: Liveness, dependency, business readiness, freshness and release validity remain partially conflated.
capabilities.deleteGate: Four health classes and end-to-end trace identities are the sole production contract.

capabilities.value: Preflight, bounded mutation, migration rehearsal, release identity, rollback, backup and restore discipline.
capabilities.defect: Many scripts bind historical cycle identities and service-specific packets, increasing drift and audit cost.
capabilities.deleteGate: Generic runner covers all active release types and historical packets have no runtime consumer.

capabilities.value: Potential discovery context from public intelligence sources.
capabilities.defect: Licensing, latency, manipulation resistance and incremental value are not proven.
capabilities.deleteGate: Independent ADR either promotes a licensed context source or retires the code.

capabilities.value: Account loss, leverage, liquidation and personal position calculations with tests.
capabilities.defect: No authoritative Portfolio Risk module and no guaranteed isolation from system ActionState.
capabilities.deleteGate: V2 risk views cannot upgrade ActionState and portfolio concentration tests pass.

capabilities.value: Status dictionary, display naming, formatting and anti-internal-enum tests.
capabilities.defect: Adapters are not yet limited to a single DecisionSnapshot schema.
capabilities.deleteGate: Adapters cannot create direction, score, freshness or plan fields and all pages use the V2 snapshot.

capabilities.value: Selected environment and contract patterns may inform V2 adapters.
capabilities.defect: Mixed age and ownership; no blanket inheritance is safe.
capabilities.deleteGate: Each consumer is classified during its owning V2 package.
